parameters.jsonBody:
{
  "person_locations": ["Faribault, Minnesota"],
  "person_location_radius_miles": 250,
  "organization_industry_tag_ids": ["Machinery Manufacturing", "Fabricated Metal Products", "Industrial Machinery"],
  "person_titles": ["Sourcing Manager", "Procurement Manager", "Operations Manager", "Plant Manager"],
  "contact_email_status": ["verified"],
  "per_page": 15
}

parameters.subject: =Lead Review — {{ $json.full_name }}, {{ $json.company }} (Score: {{ $json.score }}/10)

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO leads (lead_name, email, phone, source, metadata, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.full_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.email.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  'bnb_lead_generator',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({company: $json.company, title: $json.title, location: $json.city + ", " + $json.state, apollo_score: $json.score, score_reason: $json.reason, draft_sent: true}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
